products.title: P-Art01R Rechargeable Mini LED/UV Nail Art Lamp
O NAIL New Cordless AI UV Lamp – Smart LED Nail Lamp with 109 LEDs

description.plain: Professional-grade dual LED UV nail lamp with fast curing and advanced safety features for salon-quality gel nails at home or in the studio.

values.label: Eos 9 Nail Lamp Uv Gloves Kit

unique_selling_points: 30 dual LED UV beads deliver rapid, low-heat curing with auto sensor and timer controls for professional results.
metadata.top_features:
30 dual LED UV beads provide high luminance and efficient curing for gels, resins, and gems
Auto sensor hands-in-light-on technology ensures safe, hands-free operation
Three preset timer settings (30s, 60s, 90s) allow precise curing control
LCD display shows real-time curing time for easy monitoring
Detachable magnetic tray offers ample space and prevents desktop staining
metadata.tech_specs:
Beads: 30 dual LED UV beads
Input/Output Voltage: AC 100-240V, 50/60Hz
Material: Engineering ABS plastic
Nail Lamp Size: 190 x 200 x 85 mm
Nail Lamp Weight: 550 g
Wavelength: 365 nm, 395 nm, 405 nm
Timer Settings: 30s, 60s, 90s
Power Saving Mode: Auto sensor, 5 minutes

description.plain: Please Note: Due to the update of our brand logo, we will randomly send products in either the old or new packaging, but it will not affect the product quality. Thank you for your understanding during this transition. Features: Best Light Source – equipped with 30 pcs dual LED UV beads with 54 watts high power, low heat, no harm, comfortable, dry your gels fast and efficiently. Well Compatible With All Nails - UV gel, UV resin, poly gel, builder/extension gel, nail sculpture gel, rhinestone gems glue. Faster Curing - Professional salon edge nail lamp shortens your curing time by 50% than other nail lamps. It takes only 30s to dry nail UV glue and 60s to dry rhinestone gem glue. Enjoy a beautiful, long-lasting gel color! Power Saving - Without any operation for 5 minutes, the lamp will begin power-saving mode. Auto Sensor - Hands in, light on; hands out, light off. You can control the light by simply inserting or removing your hands and no need to press any buttons. 3 Timer Setting - The 30s, 60s, 90s timers make you set the curing time easily. No need to worry about over-drying. LCD Display - big display screen for you to see the working time clearly and choose the time you need. Detachable Magnetic Tray & Large Space - Tray avoids staining the desktop. Suitable for both hands and feet. Large space is good for 2 hands’ use at the same time. Premium Materials - MelodySusie Eos 9 Gel Nail Lamp is made of premium Engineering ABS plastic, which is lightweight, sturdy and healthy. It is an ideal choice for salon and home! Specifications Input / Output Voltage Range: AC100-240V/50-60Hz Beads Number: 30 Material: ABS Nail Lamp Size: L190*W200*H85mm (7.48*7.88*3.35inches) Nail Lamp Weight: 550g (1.21lb) Wavelength: 365nm+405nm Note: According to the receiving address, the package includes a national standard plug or a conversion plug. How to Use Step 1: Connect the power cord to a secure outlet. Step 2: Put your hands in and the lamp will automatically turn on (30s). Step 3: To stop drying, simply remove your hands. Or Step 4: Choose a pre-set timer button (30s, 60s, 90s) as needed. The lamp will run until the preset time has elapsed.

products.title: P-Art01R Rechargeable Mini LED/UV Nail Art Lamp

description.plain: A compact, rechargeable LED UV nail lamp delivering fast, reliable curing for gel nails and nail art.

unique_selling_points: Rechargeable mini design with 5x concentrated UV light and 14-day battery life for travel-friendly, professional-quality nail curing.
metadata.top_features:
5x concentrated UV light: Enables rapid curing of gel nail polish and rhinestone glue for efficient nail art sessions
Rechargeable battery with 14-day usage: Provides long-lasting power for travel or on-the-go manicures
Compact and portable: Lightweight and compact design makes it easy to carry for travel or daily use
Dual timer modes (20s, 60s): Offers flexible curing options for different nail products
Protective transparent cover: Ensures lens safety and protects eyes during use
metadata.tech_specs:
Power Source: Rechargeable battery (450mAh)
Battery Life: Up to 14 days per charge
Timer Settings: 20s (short press), 60s (long press)
Package Size: 5.08 x 2.52 x 0.94 inches
Color: White or Purple
USB-C charging port

media.alt_text: P-Art01R Rechargeable Mini LED/UV Nail Art Lamp

variants.title: P-Art01R Rechargeable Mini LED/UV Nail Art Lamp

description.plain: Features: Mini But Fast: Equipped with the Innovative Chips uv beads, Melodysusie handheld uv light for nails can achieve 5 times concentrated light. Fast curing gel nail polish in 10s and Rhinestone Glue in 12s. Rechargeable & Portable: Comes with 450mAh capacity battery, this potable nail lamp charge once and can be used for 14 days, its lightweight and compact design is suitable for travel and easy to carry. It will be a good helper during trip&daily nail art with your besties. 20S/60S Timer Modes: The mini nail dryer has 2 timer settings for choice, short press for 20s timer setting, long press for 60s timer setting, it is efficient for gel manicures and nail art, can cure nail glue, base&top coat, nail extension gel et. Safe & Long Lasting: Led Nail Light For Gel Nails adopts high hardness transparent protective cover to protect the lens, square spotlight design to protect the lens while protecting your eyes; UV nail lamp is engineered for longevity and superior performance. Crafted from high-quality materials, it ensures consistent and reliable curing for all your nail art needs. Enjoy Nail Art And Save Money: Design your own nails and share the fun with your sisters, daughter, and mother right at home. It's the perfect gift for birthdays, holidays, anniversaries, Christmas, Valentine's Day, and Mother's Day. Specifications: Color: White Package size: 5.08 x 2.52 x 0.94 inches

products.title: O NAIL New Cordless AI UV Lamp – Smart LED Nail Lamp with 109 LEDs

description.plain: A smart LED nail lamp with 109 LEDs, AI-powered sensors, and dual light technology for ultra-fast, even curing in salons or at home.

values.label: 2 Batteries, Comes With Free Charger Station

unique_selling_points: AI-powered sensor automatically detects gel type and thickness for precise, hands-free curing with dual light wavelengths for faster results.
metadata.top_features:
109 high-power LEDs provide full 360-degree coverage for consistent curing
AI smart sensor detects gel type and thickness, adjusting curing time and intensity for optimal results
Dual light source modes reduce curing time by half for ultra-fast results
Touchless infrared sensor enables hygienic, hands-free operation
Battery-compatible design allows for portable, cordless use
metadata.tech_specs:
LEDs: 109 high-power LEDs
Light Source: Dual wavelength LED
Coverage: 360-degree light coverage
Battery: Optional single or dual rechargeable batteries (sold separately)
Warranty: 1 year
Material: Plastic

media.alt_text: O NAIL New Cordless AI UV Lamp – Smart LED Nail Lamp with 109 LEDs

variants.title: O NAIL New Cordless AI UV Lamp – Smart LED Nail Lamp with 109 LEDs

description.plain: 💎 O NAIL AI UV Lamp – Smarter, Faster, Flawless Curing Take your nail and lash artistry to the next level with the O NAIL AI UV Lamp. Engineered with 109 high-power LEDs, AI-powered sensors, and dual light technology, this professional-grade lamp guarantees fast, even, and safe curing every time. Whether you’re running a salon or perfecting nails at home, the O NAIL AI UV Lamp adapts to your needs with smart precision, touchless operation, and optional portable battery power. -BATTERY SOLD SEPARATELY 🌟 Why Choose the O NAIL AI UV Lamp? ✨ 109 High-Power LEDs – Long-lasting (50,000+ hours) with full coverage for consistent curing. ✨ AI Smart Sensor – Detects gel type and thickness, automatically adjusting time & intensity. ✨ Ultra-Fast Curing – Dual light wavelengths reduce curing time by half. ✨ 360° Light Coverage – No dead zones; every angle of the nail cures evenly. ✨ Touchless Infrared Sensor – Hands-free curing for a hygienic, professional experience. ✨ Ergonomic & Stylish Design – Lightweight, durable, and sleek for salon or home use. ✨ Battery Compatible – Use with optional single or dual rechargeable batteries (sold separately). 🛠️ Product Highlights LEDs: 109 High-Power LEDs Technology: AI smart detection + dual light source Modes: Auto-adjust curing + touchless sensor Design: Ergonomic, compact, and portable Warranty: 1 Year Battery Options (Sold Separately): Single Battery – On-the-go power Dual Battery + Charger Station – Extended use for salons 🎯 Built for Professionals & Enthusiasts For Salons: Handle high volumes with ultra-fast curing, AI precision, and reliable performance. For At-Home Use: Achieve salon-quality nails without guesswork—perfect curing every time. For Mobile Nail Techs: Pair with battery packs for cordless portability anywhere you work. 🚀 The Game-Changer in Nail Curing The O NAIL AI UV Lamp isn’t just a lamp—it’s a smart assistant for nail and lash artistry. With AI adaptability, powerful LED coverage, and battery compatibility, it ensures professional results faster, safer, and smarter. LIMITED TIME OFFER!!! For questions- please call us at 661-412-7518

description.plain: A high-efficiency 48W UV LED nail lamp with 36 LEDs for fast, reliable, and gentle gel polish curing.

unique_selling_points: Combines 36 UV LEDs and 48W UV LED power for rapid curing and gentle, safe nail care.
metadata.top_features:
36 UV LEDs and 48W UV LED output: Cures gel polish quickly for shorter waiting times
Dual wavelength (365 nm UV and 405 nm LED): Ensures gentle, safe, and effective curing for nails and skin
Long bulb lifespan (up to 50,000 hours): Reduces replacement frequency and maintenance
Wide comfort base: Provides ample space and stability for easy cleaning and use
LCD display with auto on/off: Offers convenient monitoring and energy-saving operation
metadata.tech_specs:
Power: 48W
LED Count: 36
UV Wavelengths: 365 nm (UV), 405 nm (LED)
Bulb Lifespan: Up to 50,000 hours
Power Source: AC-powered
Display: LCD with auto on/off

description.plain: Efficiency Meets Elegance With 36 LED beads, the SUN4 UV LED nail lamp cures any gel polish in record time, delivering flawless results with unmatched efficiency. Say goodbye to long waiting times and hello to beautiful nails in half the time. Longevity and Reliability Crafted with high-quality UV LED bulbs, the SUN4 ensures longevity and reliability, with a lifespan of up to 50,000 hours. Enjoy generations of exquisite nail art without worrying about bulb replacements. Gentle and Protective Experience safe and gentle nail care with targeted 365 nm UV light and 405 nm LED light wavelengths, keeping your eyes and skin protected while your nails receive tender loving care. Comfortable and Spacious Design The SUN4 features a wide comfort base, providing ample space for manicures, pedicures, and easy cleaning. Its sleek LCD display and auto on/off function make nail care a breeze. Contact our customer support team with any issues or questions and we'll be there to help.

Efficiency Meets Elegance With 36 LED beads, the SUN4 UV LED nail lamp cures any gel polish in record time, delivering flawless results with unmatched efficiency. Say goodbye to long waiting times and hello to beautiful nails in half the time. Longevity and Reliability Crafted with high-quality UV LED bulbs, the SUN4 ensures longevity and reliability, with a lifespan of up to 50,000 hours. Enjoy generations of exquisite nail art without worrying about bulb replacements. Comfortable and Spacious Design The SUN4 features a wide comfort base, providing ample space for manicures, pedicures, and easy cleaning. description.plain: What it is: Introducing Revel Nail's Spectra UV LED Nail Lamp! This 36 Watt UV/LED lamp is low heat, lightweight, and offers four time settings! Plus, a smartphone holder so you can watch our YouTube videos, or catch up on your guilty pleasure show! Give your nails the salon treatment with any of our gel polishes, add a high shine finish to your dip powder manicure with Glass Shield or Tack-Free Topcoat, or a matte finish with our Matte Gel Top Coat. Visit HERE, to see our Spectra Lamp overview page for more details and helpful tips. Pro Tip: Get the most out of your Holo Chrome, Mirror Chrome or Fantasy Chrome shades by using Tack-Free Gel + Spectra Lamp for the ultimate chrome finishes .

description.plain: Effortless, Flawless Curing Indulge in the ultimate nail care experience with the SUN2C UV LED Nail Lamp. Achieve salon-worthy nails with ease, thanks to the powerful LEDs and full-coverage design that provide ultra-fast curing times. Monitor the countdown on the large LED screen for precision timing and impeccable results. Customized Curing Options Enjoy versatile curing options with the auto on/off feature or choose from preset times of 10, 30, 60, or 90 seconds to achieve the perfect cure. Whether you prefer a quick touch-up or a thorough treatment, SUN2C has you covered. Ultra-Fast Curing Time Experience unparalleled speed with ultra-fast curing times, thanks to the powerful LEDs and full-coverage design. Say goodbye to long drying times and hello to perfectly cured nails in half the time of other UV lamps Long-Lasting Performance Invest in quality with high-quality UV LED bulbs that boast an impressive lifespan of up to 50,000 hours. With SUN2C, you can enjoy generations of flawless nail art without worrying about bulb replacements Safe & Gentle Protect your eyes and skin with targeted 365nm UV light and 405nm LED light wavelengths. SUN2C ensures a safe and gentle curing process, allowing you to pamper your nails with peace of mind Convenient Features Experience unparalleled convenience with the removable mirrored base panel, perfect for pedicures and easy cleanup Package Includes SUN2C Nail Lamp x 1 1.8m Power Adapter x 1 User Manual x 1 Gel Polish Application Manual x 1

Low heat mode offers comfortable curing for builder and hard gels
Auto on/off and touch panel interface for easy, hassle-free operation
Removable base and compact design enhance portability and convenience

description.plain: Efficient Curing Options for Every Need Experience unparalleled versatility with the SUN3 UV LED Nail Lamp. Choose between Double Power mode for ultra-fast curing or Low Heat Mode for long, consistent curing of builder and hard gels. With preset times ranging from 5 to 90 seconds and a large LED screen for easy monitoring, achieving the perfect cure has never been simpler. Quality You Can Trust Invest in quality with SUN3's high-quality UV LED bulbs, designed to last up to 50,000 hours. Say goodbye to frequent bulb replacements and hello to generations of flawless nail art. Plus, rest assured that your eyes and skin are protected during the curing process, thanks to targeted 365nm UV light and 405nm LED light wavelengths. Convenience at Your Fingertips Enjoy unparalleled convenience with the SUN3 UV LED Nail Lamp. The auto on/off feature ensures effortless operation, while the removable base panel makes pedicures a breeze. Contact our customer support team with any issues or questions and we'll be there to help. description.plain: The SUNUV X5Plus UV/LED Nail Lamp with 36 Leds For 80 watts. Made with the latest technology for curing LED and UV products. 36 LED lights evenly spaced for a proper cure. Cures all five fingers and toes - Fast Curing Motion activated LED lights. Preset Timer: 10 seconds, 30 seconds, 60 seconds, and 99 seconds Low Heat Mode/Double Power Mode. The automatic timer which starts when the hand enters the lamp. Light and Compact. Australian Plug. UNIQUE 99S LOW HEAT MODE for more comfort when curing builders and hard gels. During this mode, the power enhances gradually to protect your tender skin from tingling sensations, exothermic reactions and from heat spikes. NOTE: Our lamps have been tested and obtained their Certificate of Conformity.

Professional-grade dual LED/UV nail lamp with long-lasting bulbs and smart sensor for fast, safe curing of gel polishes.

values.label: Aurora 4 Nail Lamp Uv Gloves Kit

unique_selling_points: Dual-band LED/UV lamp with 27 long-lasting bulbs and automatic motion sensor for efficient, hygienic curing.
metadata.top_features:
Dual-band LED/UV light (365nm/405nm) enables curing of both LED and UV gel polishes for versatile use
27 high-luminance, long-lasting bulbs reduce replacement frequency and maintenance
Automatic motion sensor starts and stops curing for hands-free, hygienic operation
Three timer settings (30s, 60s, 90s) allow precise curing time for different gel types
Removable base and ample space cure multiple nails at once, increasing efficiency

Power: 48 W
Lamp Type: LED/UV dual-band (365nm/405nm)
Bulb Count: 27
Timer Settings: 30s, 60s, 90s
Weight: 3.1 lbs
Material: Engineering ABS plastic and metal

description.plain: *Please Note: Due to the update of our brand logo, we will randomly send products in either the old or new packaging, but it will not affect the product quality. Thank you for your understanding during this transition. Features: 【High Power and LG Dual Light Source】48W powerful LED UV nail lamp which emit 365nm-405nm wavelength make the most kinds of LED and UV gel polishes dried all-around quickly, ideal for curing most Nail UV gel, UV top coat, UV Builder Gel, and led nail gel. 【Professional Salon Nail Lamp】27pcs long-lasting LED UV bulbs with a long lifespan, you don’t have to consider replacing the lamp bead, it is high luminance and light efficiency, low electric power consumption, energy-saving, and environment-friendly. A high-quality nail lamp weighs 3.1Ib, is powerful at 48 watts with a unique timer button design for a salon. Ample space with a removable base can cure five fingernails or toenails. 【Safety and Sensor Design】Beads are not harmful to your eyes, hands, and feet and effectively prevent skins from blackening, the automatic sensor allows you to start or stop curing simply by inserting or removing your hands/feet. 【3 Timer Setting and Quick Drying Design】Randomly select or switch the working time: 30s, 60s, 90s as you needed. Curing time depends on the brand gel you used, the LCD light is on the back and displays the time you have settled, very convenient for the manicurist to control. 【Premium Materials】MelodySusie Gel Nail Lamp is made of premium Engineering ABS plastic and metal, which is sturdy and healthy. It is an ideal choice for salon and home use. It is an essential tool for nail art technicians and starters. How to Use Our Nail Lamps 1. Use the appropriate auto-timed setting (per your gel polish’s requirements) after apply gel polish, or simply insert your hand/foot and the lamp will automatically activate. 2. As our nail lamp features a smart motion sensor, avoid removing your hand until curing is finished. If gel polish is a bit tacky after drying, please wipe your nails with a gentle cleanser. 3. Please note our lamp works for all kinds of LED and UV gel polish. Notice UV light cures UV gel polish which has 350-380nm photo initiator. LED light cure LED gel polish which has 380-410nm photo-initiator. Dual-Band Mixed LED/UV emits 350-410nm wavelength to cure both UV and LED gel polish. Note: According to the receiving address, the package includes a national standard plug or a conversion plug.

*Please Note: Due to the update of our brand logo, we will randomly send products in either the old or new packaging, but it will not affect the product quality. Thank you for your understanding during this transition. description.plain: A compact, high-power UV LED nail lamp with 24 LEDs and double power mode for fast, effective curing anywhere.

unique_selling_points: Double power mode delivers ultra-fast curing in half the time of standard UV lamps while high-quality bulbs last up to 50,000 hours.
metadata.top_features:
24 high-power LED beads provide optimal coverage in a compact design for efficient manicures and pedicures
Double power mode enables ultra-fast curing, saving time for both nails and users
Auto on/off and customizable preset times offer convenience and energy savings
Low heat mode with 99 seconds of gentle curing protects eyes and skin during builder and hard gel applications
Removable base panel and LCD display ensure easy cleanup and intuitive operation

UV Wavelength: 365 nm

description.plain: Make heads turn with stunning nails no matter where you are, courtesy of the sleek and powerful SUN5 UV LED Nail Lamp. With 24 high-power LED beads packed into a UV LED gel nail lamp, experience optimal coverage in less space for speedy and effortless manicures and pedicures. Effortless Nail Curing, Anytime, Anywhere Experience convenience like never before with the SUN5's Auto On/Off feature and customizable preset times. Whether you're on the go or at home, achieve the perfect cure with ease, thanks to the large LED screen countdown and intuitive controls. Rapid Curing, Unmatched Durability Step up your nail game with the SUN5's Double Power mode, delivering ultra-fast curing in half the time of other UV lamps. Plus, with high-quality UV LED bulbs designed to last up to 50,000 hours, enjoy generations of flawless nail art with confidence. Safety and Comfort First Indulge in a safe and gentle nail curing experience with Low Heat Mode, providing 99 seconds of less intense curing for builder and hard gels. Targeted 365 nm UV light and 405 nm LED light wavelengths ensure your eyes and skin stay protected while your nails receive the care they deserve. Convenient and Versatile Design Enjoy the flexibility of the SUN5's removable base panel, allowing for easy cleanup and hassle-free pedicures. Plus, with its LCD display and sleek design, this nail lamp is both functional and stylish. Contact our customer support team with any issues or questions and we'll be there to help.
